coverage_summary: browser-side fake asset clone/material/team-color/refresh contract passed
missing asset paths still create visible fallback visuals for worker, footman, townhall, barracks, farm, tower, and goldmine
explicit refresh preserves live entity position and rotation
startup and refresh produce no severe console errors
manifest status audit has no unapproved imports and no external asset URLs
worker uses forced RTS proxy with team color
nine A1 target keys map to fallback routes

product_verdict.summary: The current S0/project-proxy fallback system is stable enough to protect a later Quaternius import attempt, provided the import keeps deterministic fallback paths and does not remove S0 proxies.

remaining_blockers_for_import: This test did not import Quaternius GLBs; it proves the current fallback safety net only.
Goldmine real gather loop with Mine + Resource Gold composition still needs a smoke proof.
Tower projectile spawn and target/range proof with candidate height still needs a smoke proof.
Town Hall/Barracks/Farm construction, selection, training, and rally behavior with candidate scales still needs proof.
